with_skill_vs_baseline.pass_rate: +7% (100% vs 93%) — baseline fails output template assertion in batch eval
with_skill_vs_baseline.tokens: +36% more tokens (89K vs 66K — skill produces more structured, detailed reports)
with_skill_vs_baseline.quality: with_skill follows structured output template consistently, produces zlte stopy with severity levels, and includes person-to-company matrix. Baseline in eval 1 actually found more CRZ connections (STRIM-SK, CULTUS) by tracing historical directors more aggressively.

eval_highlights.eval_1_deep: Both produced thorough reports. Baseline found STRIM-SK (70K CRZ) and CULTUS Ruzinov (67K CRZ) by tracing 4th historical person (Buocik). With_skill traced 3 active persons only. Baseline used 77% more tool calls (53 vs 30) but found more connections.
eval_highlights.eval_2_batch: With_skill was much more efficient: -26% tokens, -48% tool calls, -25% faster. Both found no person overlaps. Baseline flagged threshold gaming on DREVEX (212K near 215K threshold) — a strong finding. With_skill flagged YEMANITY CRZ dependency.
eval_highlights.eval_3_ownership: Both successfully traced Aricoma → Karel Komarek / KKCG. With_skill used more tokens (136K vs 61K) and tool calls (59 vs 30) — it went broader, tracing Mario Haronik's other companies and CRZ red flags in addition to the ownership chain.
